assessments.rationale: Some seat rail applications require >0.45% C for surface hardness. ZOLLERN standard grade range includes C45 (0.42-0.50% C) and 42CrMo4 which meets this requirement.
assessments.mitigation: Specify C45 or 42CrMo4 grade for hardness-critical applications; verify carbon content in EN 10204 3.1 cert per heat

assessments.rationale: 6-12 week die lead time for new geometry can conflict with OEM program launch timelines. Mitigated by die library reuse and parallel PPAP.
assessments.mitigation: Leverage existing die library for standard seat rail and guide channel geometries; initiate die design in parallel with OEM drawing approval phase

assessments.rationale: Maximum IH coil length may limit hardening of very long seat rail profiles (>1,500 mm). Mitigated by multi-pass IH or customer-side IH.
assessments.mitigation: Multi-pass IH for profiles exceeding single-coil length; alternatively deliver unhardened and Tier 1 applies IH in-house

assessments.rationale: ZOLLERN already holds IATF 16949 certification. EN 10204 3.1 material documentation and PPAP Level 3 capability in place.
Seat rail profiles, window regulator guides, and drivetrain shaft blanks are all well within 160 mm maximum width constraint.
